{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/87920408?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/sondt99", "id": 87920408, "login": "sondt99", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg3OTIwNDA4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/sondt99", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49854", "cvss": {"score": 3.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-126", "name": "Buffer Over-read"}], "description": "### Summary

Tornado's optional native extension `tornado.speedups` implements `websocket_mask` without validating that the `mask` argument is exactly four bytes long. The C function reads four bytes from `mask` unconditionally, even when Python passes a shorter byte string. This can read beyond the provided buffer, exposing up to 3 bytes of uninitialized memory.

The behavior is reachable from Tornado's XSRF token decoder when `xsrf_cookies=True` and the native extension is active. 

### Mitigations

This bug is fixed in Tornado 6.5.6. Prior to upgrading to this version, setting the environment variable TORNADO_EXTENSION=0 will disable the vulnerable code (at the expense of reducing websocket performance).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0045, "percentile": 0.36328}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-cx3h-4qpv-8hc9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-12T18:30:19Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cx3h-4qpv-8hc9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-cx3h-4qpv-8hc9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49854"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-12T18:30:19Z", "references": ["https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado/security/advisories/GHSA-cx3h-4qpv-8hc9", "https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado/releases/tag/v6.5.6", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cx3h-4qpv-8hc9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/tornadoweb/tornado/security-advisories/GHSA-cx3h-4qpv-8hc9", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado", "summary": "Tornado has out-of-bounds memory access via C extension", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-12T18:30:21Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-cx3h-4qpv-8hc9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.5.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "tornado"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.5.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Tornado has out-of-bounds memory access via C extension
